22.6996*(-(-0.5447*x_1 - 1)**2 - 0.8686 - 0.5195*exp(-0.796*x_2))**2 + 26.1224*(exp(0.1899*x_2) + 0.0864*sinh(0.9046 - 1.2419*x_1) - 0.9335)**2 + 0.0798*sin(0.8715*(x_2 + 0.007)**2 + 2.074*sin(0.9432*x_1 + 2.0048) + 5.7336) + 0.0428*sin(2.2879*exp(0.6634*x_2) - 0.6102*sin(2.424*x_1 - 5.3912) + 7.8681) + 0.1*sin(-0.3548*sin(2.0047*x_2 - 9.7788) + 0.4596*sinh(0.9986 - 1.7371*x_1) + 12.6525) + 0.0119

0.4491*exp(0.1899*x_2) - 0.0206*sin(45.2079*(-0.5447*x_1 - 1)**2 + 22.2923 + 23.487*exp(-0.796*x_2)) - 0.0405*sin(1.8457*(x_2 + 0.007)**2 + 4.3922*sin(0.9432*x_1 + 2.0048) - 5.0302) - 0.2049*sin(-0.3659*sin(2.0047*x_2 - 9.7788) + 0.474*sinh(0.9986 - 1.7371*x_1) + 6.4063) + 0.0388*sinh(0.9046 - 1.2419*x_1) + 0.012*sinh(-4.5313*exp(0.6634*x_2) + 1.2085*sin(2.424*x_1 - 5.3912) - 4.6671) + 1.1621
